CustomField.formula: IF( ISBLANK( FEC_Interaction_Email__c ), "", LEFT(FEC_Interaction_Email__c , 2) & "****" & MID( FEC_Interaction_Email__c , FIND("@", FEC_Interaction_Email__c ) - 2, 2 ) & "@" & RIGHT( FEC_Interaction_Email__c , LEN(FEC_Interaction_Email__c ) - FIND("@", FEC_Interaction_Email__c ) ) )
CustomField.label: Interaction Email (Delete)
